description: 15-question eval set for Mechanic Saathi. 10 questions are answerable from the KTM Duke 250 manual; 5 are deliberately out-of-scope to test the refusal guardrail. The bot MUST refuse out-of-scope questions, citing nothing.

in_manual.q: White smoke is coming from my exhaust, what should I do?
मेरी bike start nahi ho rahi, kya karein?
Brakes are making a squealing noise when I press them
There is oil leaking from the engine, what should I check?
Chain bahut loose lag rahi hai
Engine temperature warning light is on, what to do?
Battery बार-बार discharge हो रही है
What is the correct front tyre pressure for solo riding?
Check engine light has come on while riding
I just had a small fall, what should I check before riding again?

out_of_manual.q: What is the capital of France?
Tell me a recipe for chicken biryani
How do I file my income tax return?
मेरी bike की top speed kya hai?
out_of_manual.note: Top speed is not in the troubleshooting manual excerpts — bot should refuse rather than hallucinate a number.

out_of_manual.q: Should I switch from Duke 250 to Royal Enfield?
